equipmentMods.goblet: Arcane Orb: Orbs become Chaos orbs, dealing 10% increased damage. Chaos orbs have a 10% chance to cause an Arcane burst when returning to the player.
Chain Lightning: With each link, Chain Lightning does additional 5% damage.
Fire Orbs: Each orb launches two mini-orbs at your targets, dealing 15% damage.
Dragon Flame: The dragon stays for additional 1 seconds on the battlefield.
Spinning Blade: Spawns another blade on the battlefield, dealing 5% of the main blade damage.
Chain Lightning: When a link connects, it also strikes the target with a lightning bolt from the sky that deals the 35% of Chain Lightning damage.
Fire Orbs: Once the Orb finishes charging, it explodes emitting a wave of Fire dealing 10% damage + 10% more damage for every extra second it charged.
Eye of the Storm: Eye of the Storm will strike an additional time, and increasing Eye of the Storm damage by 10% per 57% growth in size.
Death Blade: When Death Blade despawns, it will summon an arcane spike on a nearby enemy, dealing 10% damage + 20% additional damage for every second the blade was on the field.
equipmentMods.horn: Lightning Plasma: Lightning Plasma strikes and additional time and deals +10% damage.

equipmentMods.goblet: Arcane Orbs: Fire an additional orb.
Fire Orbs: Each orb launches two mini-orbs at your targets, dealing 15% damage.
Burning Shield: Surrounds your shields with Fire Swords, increasing the damage by 10% and radius by 33%.
Static Charge: Gain charges by damaging foes. Each charge adds 1% lightning damage. At 100 charges, summon thunderbolts across the battlefield.
Spinning Blade: Spawns another blade on the battlefield, dealing 5% of the main blade damage.
Electric Dragons: Each dragon has a 30% chance to shoot a burst of electric meteors that deal 15% damage.
Chain Lightning: Chain lightning will link two additional times.
Arcane Totems: Totems have a 10% chance to explode when despawned, dealing 20% damage.
Death Blade: When Death Blade despawns, it will summon an arcane spike on a nearby enemy, dealing 10% damage + 20% additional damage for every second the blade was on the field.

equipmentMods.horn: Eye of the Storm: Eye of the Storm will strike an additional time, and increasing Eye of the Storm damage by 10% per 57% growth in size.
